text.title: Giving and Receiving Feedback Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: strip-to-behavior
step.action: Convert any 'you are X' into 'when Y happened, you did Z'.

step.name: add-impact-and-intent
step.action: Add impact line (on you/team/outcome). If negative, add Intent inquiry → SBII.

step.name: tag-quadrant-honest
step.action: Tag Radical Candor quadrant honestly. If self-tag is 'radical-candor', cross-check that challenge is direct AND care is visible.
step.decision-gate: If self-deception suspected, send to a peer for sanity check first.

step.name: deliver-or-validate
step.action: Run `validate-feedback.py`. Deliver in private channel; pause for response.
